phase31a_expected_error.reported_error: OperationalError('table provenance_validated_events_v1 has 11 columns but 10 values were supplied')

schema_plan.core_rule: Repair Phase31A temp DB sample insert column mismatch in temp DB only; live DB schema is not changed.
schema_plan.known_parent_error: table provenance_validated_events_v1 has 11 columns but 10 values were supplied
hard_rules: STAGING is parser-normalized but not trusted.
VALIDATED is gate-approved but not canonical truth yet.
A superseded canonical row must reference the previous canonical_uid.
Every canonical row must link to a validated_uid.
Every validated row must link to a staging_uid.
Every staging row must link to a raw_uid.
Temp DB only in this phase.
No API or external network call.

matrix_contract.core_rule: Stress-test RAW -> STAGING -> VALIDATED -> CANONICAL -> QUARANTINE lifecycle constraints in temp DB only; live DB schema is not changed.
lifecycle_rules: RAW must be immutable and uniquely hash-addressed.
CANONICAL is versioned and no silent overwrite is allowed.
CANONICAL v2+ must supersede an existing canonical_uid.
QUARANTINE is not truth and truth_flag must stay 0.
Every stage requires parser_version, schema_version, raw_hash, source_hash, evidence_ref, created_utc.
Invalid lifecycle status values are rejected.

test_matrix.name: CANONICAL_V2_WITHOUT_SUPERSEDES_REJECT
test_matrix.error:
CHECK constraint failed: (canonical_version = 1 AND supersedes_canonical_uid IS NULL)
            OR
            (canonical_version > 1 AND supersedes_canonical_uid IS NOT NULL)

test_matrix.name: CANONICAL_V2_WITHOUT_SUPERSEDES_REJECT
test_matrix.error:
CHECK constraint failed: (canonical_version = 1 AND supersedes_canonical_uid IS NULL)
            OR
            (canonical_version > 1 AND supersedes_canonical_uid IS NOT NULL)

contract.core_rule: Canonical can only change by versioned append/supersede; quarantine is retained evidence and never truth. This phase is contract-only and does not mutate live DB/panel/runner/service/timer.

lifecycle_states.meaning: Artifact/event is proposed but not trusted as canonical.
Current accepted version for a canonical entity.
Old canonical version is replaced by a newer version but retained as evidence.
Bad, conflicting, incomplete, stale, or suspicious evidence is retained for review.
Evidence is retained but rejected from canonical path.
Quarantined evidence may be reviewed for future promotion but is still not truth.
A superseded/quarantined artifact may only be restored via future restore plan, dry-run, approval, real apply, post-audit.
Historical artifact retained for audit; never active without a new approved lifecycle.

canonical_supersede_rules: Canonical update must be append-only with a new canonical_uid.
canonical_version must increase monotonically per canonical_entity_uid.
supersedes_canonical_uid must exist and must belong to the same canonical_entity_uid.
New canonical version must link to validated_uid.
validated_uid must link back to staging_uid and raw_uid.
parser_version, schema_version, raw_hash, source_hash, evidence_ref are mandatory.
Old canonical version is retained as CANONICAL_SUPERSEDED, not deleted.
Future real apply must backup first and provide rollback.
quarantine_lifecycle_rules: Quarantined evidence must be retained with reason, source, hash, parser/schema version, and evidence_ref.
Quarantine promotion requires separate plan, dry-run, explicit approval, real apply, and post-audit.
Quarantine restore requires separate restore plan and explicit approval.
Bad parse, missing hash, schema conflict, source conflict, FK break, stale evidence, and overwrite attempt may route to quarantine.
Quarantine cannot become canonical without validated chain.

dryrun_contract.core_rule: Execute canonical supersede and quarantine lifecycle test cases in temp DB only. No live DB, panel, runner, service, or timer mutation.

detail_contract.core_rule: Detail-audit Phase31D REVIEW without accepting it. Classify the single failed canonical_missing_raw_hash case before any repair dry-run.
classification_rules: If canonical raw_hash schema is NOT NULL but D09 actual outcome is ACCEPT, classify as TEST_HARNESS_NULL_INJECTION_BUG_LIKELY.
Do not direct-accept Phase31D because raw_hash is mandatory and must be retested.
Do not patch live code, runner, DB, service, timer, panel, or active artifacts.
Proceed only to a new temp DB dry-run repair phase.

contract.purpose: Repair Phase31D D09 test harness bug by injecting true raw_hash=NULL directly into canonical insert and proving the NOT NULL constraint rejects it.
contract.d09_rule: D09 must attempt canonical insert with raw_hash=NULL and must be rejected by DB NOT NULL constraint.

contract.purpose: Audit Phase31D2 temp DB dry-run result before allowing Phase31 close audit.

next_roadmap.phase32_scope: Maintenance AI Control Center, state capsule, maintenance bundle, approval queue, local AI boundaries.
next_roadmap.speed_rule: Maintenance/AI/upgrade path must not slow Fast Path. Fast Path reads compact state only.
